1.name: Dark Paths
1.effect: Move 1 (during the Day), or Move 2 (at Night).

2.name: Burning Power
2.effect: Siege Attack 1, or Fire Siege Attack 1.

4.name: Dark Negotiation
4.effect: Influence 2 (during the Day), or Influence 3 (at Night).

5.name: Dark Fire Magic
5.effect: Flip this to gain one red crystal to your inventory, and one red or one black mana token.

6.name: Power of Pain
6.effect: You can play one Wound sideways, as if it were a non-Wound card. It gives +2 instead of +1. At the end of your turn, put that Wound in your discard pile.

7.name: Invocation
7.effect: Discard a Wound card to gain a red or black mana token, or discard a non-wound card to gain a white or green mana token. You must spend a mana token gained this way immediately.

8.name: Polarization
8.effect: You can use one mana as a mana of the opposite color. During the Day, you could use a black mana as any color other than black (not to power the stronger effect of spells). At Night, you could use a gold mana as black to power the stronger effect of a Spell.

9.name: Motivation
9.effect: Once a turn, one of your Units may use its ability without paying its activation cost.

10.name: Healing Ritual
10.effect: Flip this to throw away up to two Wounds from your hand. One of them goes to the hand of the closest hero instead of to the Wound pile.

101.name: Forward March
101.effect: Move 1 for each Ready and unwounded Unit you control, to a maximum of Move 3.

102.name: Day Sharpshooting
102.effect: Ranged Attack 2 (during the Day), or Ranged Attack 1 (at Night).

103.name: Inspiration
103.effect: Ready or Heal one of your Units.

104.name: Bright Negotiation
104.effect: Influence 3 (during the Day), or Influence 2 (at Night).

105.name: Leaves in the Wind
105.effect: Once a Round: gain a green crystal to your Inventory, or a white mana token.

106.name: Whispers in the Treetops
106.effect: Once a Round: gain a white crystal to your Inventory, or a green mana token.

107.name: Leadership
107.effect: When you activate a Unit: it gets Ranged Attack +1, Attack +2 or Block +3 added to its ability.

108.name: Bonds of Loyalty
108.effect: You have one extra Command token. The Unit recruited to it costs 5 less Influence.

109.name: Prayer of Weather
109.effect: Cooperative: until your next turn, the Move cost of one terrain type is reduced by 2 (minimum 1) for you, and by 1 for other players.

201.name: Freezing Power
201.effect: Siege Attack 1, or Ice Siege Attack 1.

202.name: Potion Making
202.effect: Once a Round, except in combat: flip this for Heal 2.

203.name: White Crystal Craft
203.effect: Once a Round: flip this to gain one blue crystal to your Inventory, and one white mana token.

204.name: Green Crystal Craft
204.effect: Once a Round: flip this to gain one blue crystal to your Inventory, and one green mana token.

205.name: Red Crystal Craft
205.effect: Once a Round: flip this to gain one blue crystal to your Inventory, and one red mana token.

206.name: Glittering Fortune
206.effect: During interaction: get Influence 1 for each different color crystal in your Inventory. This Influence cannot be used outside of interaction.

207.name: Flight
207.effect: Once a Round: flip this to move to an adjacent space for free, or two spaces for 2 Move points. You must end this move in a safe space. This move does not provoke rampaging enemies.

208.name: Universal Power
208.effect: You may add one mana to a card played sideways: it gives +3 instead of +1, or +4 if it is an Action or Spell card of the same color as that mana.

209.name: Motivation
209.effect: Once a Round, on any player's turn: flip this to draw two cards. If you have the least Fame (not tied), also gain a green mana token.

210.name: Source Opening
210.effect: Cooperative: put this Skill token in the center and reroll a mana die in the Source. Any player may return it to you, face down, to use an extra basic-color die from the Source and give you a crystal of that color.

301.name: Double Time
301.effect: Move 2 (during the Day), or Move 1 (at Night).

302.name: Night Sharpshooting
302.effect: Ranged Attack 1 (during the Day), or Ranged Attack 2 (at Night).

304.name: Shield Mastery
304.effect: Block 3, or Fire Block 2, or Ice Block 2.

305.name: Resistance Break
305.effect: Choose an enemy token: it gets Armor -1 for each resistance it has, to a minimum of 1.

306.name: I Feel No Pain
306.effect: Once a turn, except in combat: discard one Wound from your hand. If you do, draw a new card.

307.name: I Don't Give a Damn!
307.effect: One card played sideways gives you +2 instead of +1. If it is an Advanced Action, Spell or Artifact, it gives +3 instead.

308.name: Who Needs Magic?
308.effect: One card played sideways gives you +2 instead of +1. If you use no die from the Source this turn, it gives +3 instead.

309.name: Motivation
309.effect: Once a Round, on any player's turn: flip this to draw two cards. If you have the least Fame (not tied), also gain a blue mana token.

310.name: Mana Overload
310.effect: Cooperative: choose a basic color and gain a mana token of that color. Put this Skill token in the center marked with that color. The first player who uses mana of that color to power a card giving Move, Influence, Attack or Block gets +4 from that card and returns the Skill to you, face down.
